disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Progressive breathlessness over two weeks with acute worsening over the last 12 hours, worse lying flat (orthopnoea)
trigger_question_examples: How long have you been short of breath and how has it changed?
Is your breathing worse when you lie down?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started about two weeks ago just on exertion, but tonight it's much worse — I can't lie down at all without feeling like I'm suffocating.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Dry, hacking, non-productive cough; no purulent sputum and no blood
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the cough — are you bringing anything up?
Any phlegm or blood when you cough?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a dry, harsh cough that brings nothing up at all — no phlegm, and no blood.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recent completion of thoracic radiotherapy for lung cancer (~10 weeks ago) — the key temporal context
trigger_question_examples: Any recent treatments or medical history I should know about?
When did you finish your cancer treatment?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I had radiation to my chest for lung cancer and finished it about ten weeks ago.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Low-grade fever and generalised malaise over the same two-week timeline
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fevers or felt run down?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've felt feverish and worn out for a couple of weeks — my home thermometer said 37.6 tonight.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Reliever inhaler (salbutamol) used with no effect
trigger_question_examples: Have you tried anything for it?
Did your puffer help at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've used my blue puffer over and over and it does absolutely nothing.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Signs of respiratory compromise — increased work of breathing, can only speak short phrases, home oximeter 92%
trigger_question_examples: Are you struggling to get the words out?
Do you have an oximeter reading you can share?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can barely finish a sentence, my shoulders are heaving to breathe, and the little finger clip says my oxygen is 92.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lives alone with no one present overnight; exhausted and sleepless
trigger_question_examples: Who is at home with you?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I live on my own — there's nobody else here tonight and I'm shattered.
